name: Skillet Chicken Dinner
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound small red potatoes, cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. About 40 minutes before serving, heat the olive or salad oil in a 10-inch skillet over medium-high heat until hot.
2. Add the onions and cook until golden brown. Remove the onions to a bowl and set aside.
3. On a sheet of waxed paper, mix together the flour, salt, dried rosemary, and pepper; blend well.
4. Coat each chicken thigh with the seasoned flour mixture.
5. Return the skillet to medium-high heat and add the remaining oil. Cook the chicken until golden brown on all sides.
6. Add the potatoes, lemon juice, cooked onions, and 1/4 cup water to the skillet. Increase the heat to high and bring to a boil.
7. Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes or until the chicken and potatoes are fork tender and juices run clear when pierced with a knife.
8. Skim off any fat from the liquid in the skillet.
9. Stir in the spinach and olives; cook until the spinach is just wilted.
Each serving contains:
Calories: 660
Fat: 37 grams
Cholesterol: 145 mg
Sodium: 1520 mg
